notes: Official site is alive but does not publish trail count or difficulty percentages. Site emphasizes terrain parks/freestyle (Main Line, Red's Backyard, Peace Park) rather than traditional named runs. Trail/mountain report page exists but does not expose stats on extracted content.

Official site mentions '100+ runs' and '2,900 acres' but provides no exact trail count or beginner/intermediate/advanced/expert percentage breakdown. Private club — detailed stats gated behind member portal.
